SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-18-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-18-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REGENTS CAB CO. REUNGCHAI, SAM IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WISNER, PRESTON HARRY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
